title: Earthly Pride
content:
How baseless is the mightiest earthly pride,
    The diamond is but charcoal purified,
    The lordliest pearl that decks a monarch's breast
    Is but an insect's sepulchre at best.
meaning:
Ella Wheeler Wilcox's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Earthly Pride"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
